stemHtml: In the cockpit there is the captain, first officer and a student pilot who has been invited to the observer seat. Prior to take-off, the first officer completes checkpoints in the checklist, which the captain accepts with ease. The student watches the pilots and understands what they are doing. What are the behaviours in this situation?

options.a: Captain - autonomous, first officer - associative, student pilot - cognitive.
options.b: Captain - autonomous, first officer - cognitive, student pilot - associative.
options.c: Captain - associative, first officer - autonomous, student pilot - cognitive.
options.d: Captain - cognitive, first officer - associative, student pilot - autonomous.
